reviews.review_description: I’m sure this game could be fun but I have a couple of issues one of them being it’s really not intuitive and there’s no multiplayer servers up the graphics are really not awesome and the voice acting is just painful for an RTS it’s very slow paced and does it make a lot of sense there’s a lot of ships that look like I could unlock them or somehow but I tried to put a solid 40 minutes just playing the game and giving it a shot and honestly from when I played it it’s really not all that fun
Very fun and addictive after your first few battles.p

reviews.review_title: One of the best RTS Games
reviews.review_description: This is by far one of the best RTS games I have ever played. Easy to learn and pick up, especially if using voice controls. One problem is do have is that voice software doesn't recognize numbers in ending in zero, such as 10 or 20. It instead recognizes them as 1 or 2 respectively.

I do love space scifi games. Well, BG1 is old and BG2 is just about to arrive. I thought give BG1 a chance.
And well, I am very impressed. I have a lot of fun, directing my fleet and see the battle around me. Very simple but efficient controls.

I'm looking forward BG2. It is already a must purchase to me.

The picture say something else

I wish I could give you a zero ￼

The game runs really well on single player but coop has way too many bugs. The game is also abandoned as they are working on the sequel even though this one never left early access. So if you are looking to purchase I would wait for the sequels release on November 7th 2025

amazing game cant wait for p.t. 

2

Short and sweet the game is very fun to play but me and my friend ( as well as other players) have experienced a bug that has fully wiped are saves and removed all are in game money so much that we cant even buy the starter ship to even try to build are progress back up. But none the less the game is very good i do think you should get the game and i wish you don't ever experience this bug. 8/10 the bug lowers my rate by 2.

This game is one of my favourites but I just have some issues with the voice commands I’ll have to say a phrase more than a couple of times for the fleet to do anything and four is full so as a example delta4 will not do its action which in case the game thinks the number 4 is full but yeah voice commands is very figgy

I have over 100 games in my VR library.  And this is the coolest thing in it.  You really feel like a spaceship, captain from the future.  I’ve been playing VR for years now and this is the first time since I first put a VR headset on that I’ve said wow so many times. ￼  if you like RTS if you like sci-fi if you like spaceships if you like really cool views, this game is for you.  If you’ve never tried RTS games or you haven’t liked them in the past, you will like this one.  

For DEVS:   Please add a feature that allows you to see the distance from one of your ships to an enemy ship. If not just some kind of digital read out with the numbers, perhaps put dots at every single intersection within a field of grid cubes, it would be kinda nice if you could just put more screens on the bridge that give us different information.

To add to this by having more screens, we could possibly also increase the amount of things we can do like let’s say we wanna put a group in a box formation, there could be an entire formation panel that could allow us to specifically place each ship in a specific spot in the formation.  Also give us more options for engagement ranges, and AI behavior options.  Also, it kind of would be more immersive if we’re not just looking at our hands the whole time.

EDIT: changing this since I learned that they’re actually is a voice command option.  Please add a grid field to the space.  That way we can include that i.voice command commands for movement.  Also if it’s possible to optimize the voice commands so they don’t immediately crash your game on the standalone that would be cool, but I totally understand that this isn’t really your fault. This is more the quest’s fault for not having enough RAM.
In the trailer when you choose your ships they rotate to you and I don't have that but The game is amazing

I just bought game and it is amaizing but it still in early access and there making a part 2 I thought they would still be working on this game for a while so do we get a discount on part 2 which is basically a updated version

reviews.review_title: This is what VR was made for!
reviews.review_description: This game really has it all. It seems most of the people who don't like the game just don't know how to play it and get frustrated. The campaign is fun and has a bit of a rogue-lite element so failing doesn't ruin your game. Between voice commands and all the controls it can seem overwhelming but getting the hang of them is so satisfying. From barking out commands to an entire fleet and just watching them rain hell on enemies in first person, it's exactly what I needed in a VR game. Well worth the price point and definitely deserves more love!

Wasn't sure what to expect but liked the look of the trailer. Campaign was challenging enough to keep me going back and really enjoyed every aspect of this! Really looking forward to the sequel, but would highly recommend getting into this game first! Well done on making such a great VR experience!
Game is cool, i enjoy it, but i can't play skirmish and online anybody have any pointers please let me know!
I tried to send it to my brother to play together but it refuses to send

This game is probably my favourite Strategy game, the fusion of action, strategy and tactical mechanics is absolutely fabulous. Even the Graphics are in my opinion absolutely fantastic, didn’t like the story to much but it is good in a objective sense.Absolute must have for strategy space game enjoyers.
Not a RTS. IDIOT training made it WAY WORSE.  Controls horrible.

This Space fleet battle game is one in a million and still has great potential. In its current state it has a full campaign with many hours of game play. Where this game could improve is the campaign 'galaxy quest' mode. This 
in my opinion could be improved on, it would be great to be able to actually attack  (real players) in a coop style where the universe would seem and feel more alive and interactive. Otherwise love the game, one of my go-to games. Thanks to the Devs. ,👍
This is by far my favorite game on the quest. Don't miss out on this one!

That is almost a masterpiece. It has so much potential. 
Dear dev, you created a raw diamond and you need to polish it. Keep up the work on the game and refine controls.

reviews.review_title: A test bed for RTS features
reviews.review_description:
I replayed the current campaign a few times, and I see nothing but potential.
This game is by far one of the few VR RTS games that scratches a very particular itch.

Please keep up the great work on a game brimming with possibilities.

Edit: I wonder if the Devs are still working on this.

Update: 3 years... Shame... was hoping to enjoy active PVP.
The game is worth a buy
This game is amazing but I feel like the developer has stopped updating and I really want the mod support or workshop but other wise very fun

reviews.review_title: Love the game shame it' not promoted
reviews.review_description: LOve this game Im a long time rts fan and its exactly fits the bill but nobody knows about it, I stumbled across it after a long time searching for rts games for the quest.
It is loosing tracking on the hands

I always liked the idea of RTS in VR and this game does it really well. You command you ship and later a while fleet from the bridge of your ship with several types of ships you can buy with several different load outs upgrades and captains.

Only reason I am not giving it 5 stars is that the controls are sometimes off. The controls are designed very well, but sometimes they just do not som will, making it difficult to click a button, target a ship and such. But it is not game breaking. You get used to it.

Best space game out for the Quest. Not your traditional flying around unless you want awful mechanics. Tons of content, graphics are okay (on quest 2 turning it to high was not a good idea), fun mechanics. The coop works sometimes and can only imagine how insane multiplayer battles can get. Please add more solar systems/missions. Lots of replay ability but the missions themselves were super short.
Bugs-
Nova bomb, Flak Cannon, Tactical Warp, and other placement things constantly go to the right, left, or anywhere but where you placed it.
Cannot see my Coop teammates Dreadnaught.
The more I play and the more dreadnaughts I seem to have the more the game glitches. Possibly because it’s in the “Coop Alpha” so that is to be expected but the bugs are there.
Update:
Games bugs now make it practically unplayable.
Either my coop teammates ships will spawn in the middle of the map or mine will. If that doesn’t happen we will be sitting in the back without any enemies or anything near watching as our ships randomly take massive amounts of damage and blow up due to absolutely nothing. Single player does work fine but I’m not a loser, I have people to play with and it simply doesn’t work.

reviews.review_title: I simply cannot find the words...
reviews.review_description:
A dream come true for this game!
Battlegroup Vr Facebook Group: www.facebook.com/groups/battlegroupvr/
Are there any bugs in it? Yes! But this is just the beginning and it gets better!
You can sit inside the ship or control the fleet from outside...Simply fantastic! I've had the pcvr version since release, but to have ported the basics to quest so nicely is brilliant

Genius game play!
Beautiful graphics!
Zero motion sickness! 
(And I'm crazy sensitive to motion in VR)

Can't recommend this instant classic enough.  
A+++

This is a truly marvelous game that unfortunately easily gets overlooked due to a relatively unexciting name. 
In this game you get to play both a fleet commander and a ship pilot whenever you feel like it, hence the title of this review. The game really takes the best of two worlds from Homeworld and Bridge Crew, simplifies them and combined together very well. There are also many ship types and customization options that make the game having some great replay-ability to try out different combinations.

The game however is kind of similar to the Homeworld RTS series in the sense you are always outnumbered slightly by the enemy. This makes many later missions quite challenging, and sometimes player may need to go back to previous missions to grind some credits and blueprints. Whether this is a negative point is up to your interpretation, but as a long time RPG player and also a space sci-fi lover, I happily accepts this as I personally think the grind isn't that bad.

There are also some minor QoL bugs / design kinks (such as UI window popping literally into your face or so far from you frequently), and crew AI (especially the pilot) not being the brightest. But overall a VERY, VERY enjoyable and addicting experience for space sci-fi fans!

reviews.review_title: This is what VR was made for!
reviews.review_description:
I'm a huge fan of the board game Star Wars: Armada where you command capital ships.  This is like that except you're Thrawn on the bridge of the Chimaera (so to speak...the ships are unique to this game, and nicely designed).


I've been playing campaign mode which is nice a gentle introduction.

Controls are intuitive.  

Only immediate change I'd like to see is a 'seated' default and that the holomap be placed in front of my avatar rather than surrounding it.

I can't wait to see where this one goes and I'm thrilled to have heard about it early.

After ten long minutes of figuring out the bells and whistles. I am not very patient, I started the missions. H@# y $#!^! 
I sound like a fraud saying this, but this is what  decades of SW and ST have been trying to recreate. It's exactly how you think it is. This game rocks. Imo until better comes (maybe a SW theme) along this is the only game to have. It's that good. I got 50 games. This is top 3. I'm afraid one day I'll finish it. Lol
Truly great work by the devs. Best I've seen in awhile.

reviews.review_description: Love it I love Star Wars so I was hoping that we can get a mod menu please

It's one of my favourite games. Love this so much. 
Thank you for creating such a great game, and this deserves to be up there with the best.
Really can't wait for the final product!

Craved a strategy game this hit where it needed too!. 
Only a few issues with crashing once or twice but other than that I recommend.!!

I am many hours in and in love with this game. I don't even particularly like RTS games. But I bought it because I love space. The POV you get in this game is so cool and I fell in love with the gameplay along the way. Worth every penny.
